Primary Policy.text:
Amazon Return Policy
Easy shopping, simple returns - that's our promise. At Amazon, we're committed to making your shopping experience as seamless and worry-free as possible. We understand that there may be times when a purchase may not meet your expectations or your needs might change. When that happens, we make completing a return simple and convenient.
Most items can be returned for a refund or replacement/exchange within 30 days of delivery as long as they are in original or unused condition. For eligible items, you can enjoy free returns at many locations near you. For information on an item's return eligibility, please check the product detail page before placing your order. After placing an order, you can find relevant information on an item's return eligibility in your Order History.
A refund will be provided if Amazon (or the third-party seller) has received the item, and determined that you are eligible for a refund. It can take up to 30 days for us to receive and process your return. In certain circumstances refund timeframes may be longer. If we need additional information about your return, we will notify you with instructions to contact Customer Service. For more information, please see our Refunds page.
2025 Holiday Season Extended Return Window
For the 2025 holiday season, most items purchased between November 1 and December 31, 2025 can be returned through January 31, 2026. Apple-branded products purchased between November 1 and December 31, 2025 can be returned through January 15, 2026.
Refund Timelines
Once we issue your refund, it may take additional time for your financial institution to make funds available in your account.
| Refund Timeline | Refund Method |
|---|---|
| 2-3 hours | Amazon.com Gift Card or Gift Card balance |
| 3-5 business days | Credit Card |
| Up to 5 business days | Shop with Reward Points |
| Up to 10 business days | Debit card |
| Checking account | |
| EBT Card | |
| Cash (at participating locations) | |
| Up to 30 days | Prepaid credit card (depending on the issuer of the card) |
| No refund issued | Promotional certificate |
Return Window
Most items sold on Amazon.com can be returned within 30 days of delivery - some exceptions include:
| 7 days |
|
| 15 days |
|
| 90 days |
|
| 180 days |
|
| 365 days |
|
Items That You Can't Return
Some products are non-returnable, such as the following:
- Perishables
- Products that may pose potential health and safety risks if returned
- Products with shipping restrictions
- Customized products made specifically for you
- Redeemable products
- Amazon Pharmacy products
- Pet medication products
- Certain digital products
- Automobiles
Additionally, products listed as "Final Sale" are non-returnable and non-refundable, including trading card games, specific discounted items, and items sold in the Amazon Haul store that are $3 and less.
In the unlikely event that a non-returnable/Final Sale item arrives damaged, defective, or materially different from what was ordered, please contact Customer Service.
Initiating a Return
To initiate a return on an item that's eligible for return, simply go to Your Orders and click on "Return Items" button next to the item. Detail instructions can be found in this video.
Third-Party Seller Returns
When you order from a third-party seller that fulfills and ships their own inventory, your return is sent back to the seller instead of Amazon. Sellers must offer one of the following:
- A return address within the United States where you can ship the item
- A prepaid return label; or
- A full refund without requesting the item be returned
For more information about returns to sellers, please refer to Returns to Third-Party Sellers.
Sending Us Your Return
You can return most items for free at over 8,000 convenient locations, typically within a 5-mile radius of your address. Additionally, most returns do not need to be boxed or labeled. Please ensure that your item is returned in original or unused condition with tags attached and hygiene seals and liners intact, and in the original manufacturer's packaging including tags, components, accessories, manuals, certificates of authenticity, and other inserts. Please return your item before the "return by date" shown in your return request confirmation email or in the "Return Request" tab in your Order History.
Please follow the return instructions for each item to receive a refund. Do not include items from separate orders in the same return.
If you have bought an item (for example, computers, electronics) on which you've saved personal information, please erase this information completely by following manufacturer instructions.
Amazon Pharmacy
Items purchased from Amazon Pharmacy are not returnable or refundable. For more details or further assistance with an Amazon Pharmacy item, please see the Amazon Pharmacy Help Page.
Amazon Business
This return policy also applies to purchases made through your Amazon Business account. For the return policies on special Amazon Business programs such as Spot Buys made through the Custom Quote feature, please consult the Amazon Business Accounts Terms and Conditions and Feature Terms and Conditions. Contact Amazon Business for more help.
Amazon Luxury Stores
For more information on Luxury Stores items, or if there are any issues with your Luxury Stores purchase, please visit our Luxury Stores Help Page.
Return Fees
While returns are generally free, certain situations or item conditions may incur fees. Note that an item cannot be sent back to you after it has been returned (except certain Luxury Stores items that incur 100% damage fees).
| Fee | Description | Amount |
|---|---|---|
| Return Shipping Fee | Most items include at least one free return shipping option. However, you may be
charged if:
|
Varies by item and/or the shipping method selected. |
| Late fee | You may be charged a fee when you do not drop off or complete a carrier pickup on or before the "return by date". | 20% of the item price for the first 30 days after the "return by date"; 100% of the item price afterwards. |
| Damage fee | You may be charged a fee when you return an item that is damaged, missing parts, not in original condition, has tags removed or have obvious signs of use for reasons not due to an Amazon.com or seller error. | Up to 50% of the item price, except for Luxury Stores items, which will be charged 100% of the item price. |
| Restocking Fee | You may be charged a fee when you return an item from any of the following product
types:
|
100% of the item price |
Heavy and/or Bulky Items
Items that are considered heavy and/or bulky:
- Weigh 50 lbs or more.
- The longest side (when packed) exceeds 59 inches.
- The item’s girth exceeds 130 inches (girth = length + 2 * (width + height)).
These returns may incur a return shipping fee that is variable based on the item’s weight, dimensions, and handling requirements. Some returns may require an appointment for a home collection by a specialty carrier team. Additional fees may apply for returns to third-party sellers. For more information about returns to sellers, please refer to Returns to Third-Party Sellers.
Discounted Purchases
If you return an item that was part of a discount qualification, we will reduce your refund to account for the return.
Returning a Gift
Go to the Returns page. Use the 17-digit order number, for example 123-1234567-1234567 (add: "how do I find this?" hover-over link) on your packing slip that came with your item or on the digital gift receipt, to initiate a return. If you can't locate the order number, ask the gift giver. If you need an exchange or replacement, you'll need to return the gift and place a new order.
- Kindle books you receive as a gift are eligible for exchange for an Amazon.com Gift Card before acceptance.
Global Store Returns
Items shipped from Amazon.com, including Amazon Resale, can be returned within 30 days of delivery, with some exceptions:
- For most Amazon Global Store returns, you will be provided with a pre-paid UPS return label which allows you to return the item(s) to any UPS drop-off point located across the US. You can find your most convenient UPS location using the following link: https://www.ups.com/dropoff/?loc=en_US
- Not all Global Store products are eligible for a prepaid return. In this case, you will need to return the item at your own expense. We recommend you return the item(s) using a trackable method at the carrier of your choice.
- It can take up to 25 days for an item to reach us once you return it. Once the item is received and processed at our fulfillment center, it takes two business days for the refund to be processed and 3-5 business days for the refund amount to show up in your account.
- Amazon will automatically refund up to $20 for return postage costs on receipt of the item. If your return postage costs exceed $20, you may contact Customer Service to request a refund of the remaining postage cost. If you return a defective, damaged or incorrect item, you'll be refunded the full postage cost, as well as your Import Fees Deposit, once your return is processed.
Special Delivery Service Returns
Items delivered with "Deluxe Delivery & Unpack" and "Deluxe Delivery & Assembly" services qualify for an Instant Return at the point of delivery. Please visit our Special Delivery Options page for more details.
Product Warranties
Please contact the manufacturer directly for product registration and warranty-related information. A manufacturer warranty may not cover used products offered on Amazon.com. Review the manufacturer warranty details on the product detail page for coverage or contact the manufacturer directly.
Unintended Item(s) in My Return
If you accidentally sent the wrong item to Amazon, please contact Customer Service as soon as possible. Note that we may not be able to locate mistakenly sent items and are unable to provide compensation in these cases. Amazon does not store items sent in error and will handle (and/or dispose) such items at our discretion.
Returning Items Purchased in a Bundle
You must return all items purchased in a Bundle with Savings to receive a refund. Partial refunds are not available.
Note:
Amazon offers a convenient return service for reasonable use by our customers. Should customers abuse this service, we may adjust its availability.
For any return, Amazon may require additional information and documentation (such as a government-issued photo identification) during the processing of a return to help determine whether to provide a refund/replacement. Amazon reserves the right to take additional actions to prevent fraud or abuse (including denial of returns, refunds or exchanges, or imposing return fees). Amazon may modify this policy at any time.

Related policies.text:
Returns to Third-Party Sellers
When you order from a third-party seller that fulfills and ships its own inventory, your return is sent back to the seller instead of Amazon.
Content
Request a return
Go to the Amazon Online Returns Center to start your return request for third-party seller items.
Get return instructions
The seller will provide one of these return methods:
- A return address in the United States
- A prepaid return label
- A full refund without returning the item
Package your return
To pack your item for safe return to the seller:
- Use the original packaging or a similar-sized box
- Disassemble items that required assembly
- Remove all personal information, passwords, and passcodes from electronic devices. For instructions on how to do this, check the manufacturer’s website or contact the manufacturer for support.
Ship your return
To return your item to the seller:
- Use the shipping label provided by the seller
- Items valued at $100 or more: Insure the shipment and use a signature service
- Items valued over $35: Use a trackable shipping service
- Items below $35: We suggest using the USPS delivery confirmation service
We may not be able to cover you under the A-to-z Guarantee if:
- The package doesn't arrive with the seller and you didn't use a trackable method to return it, or
- You refuse delivery of the shipment, to return it to the sender.
Track your refund
The seller will process your refund after receiving the return, usually within two business days. You'll receive a notification of your return and refund details. Outbound shipping charges aren't always refunded upon return.
Understanding refund delays
Refunds can be delayed if:
- Your return is in transit longer than expected.
- You use an untrackable shipping method.
- The seller receives a different item than ordered.
- An item that was sold as new, is returned with signs of use or damage.
Extra-large or heavy items
A package is defined as extra large or heavy if it:
- weights more than 150 pounds
- is over 108 inches long
- exceeds a total of 165 inches in length and girth [(2 x width) + (2 x height)].
For extra-large items, you'll receive either:
- A postage-due label (you pay for shipping)
- A prepaid label from the seller
What to do next
If you need help after returning an item to a third-party seller:
- You can contact the seller.
- If the seller doesn't respond within 48 hours, you can request an A-to-z Guarantee refund if:
- The seller doesn't offer you an approved return method within 48 hours of asking to return a damaged, defective, or not as described item, OR
- You returned an item in line with the Amazon Return Policy, but you haven't received the expected refund. Check the Return Fees section of the Amazon Return Policy before requesting an A-to-z Guarantee refund.

persona.Name: Alastair MacGregor
persona.Person description: Alastair is a Scottish historian deeply immersed in the religious and social upheavals of the 16th century. He is an expert on the life of John Knox, particularly Knox's time as a galley slave, and lectures widely on the Reformation's impact on Scotland. Alastair is committed to scholarly research, runs local Reformation reenactments, and passionately advocates for the enduring values of reform and personal conviction. He is always searching for fresh sources and enjoys robust debates on historical interpretation.

task.detail: Customer purchased the "OmniPro Wireless Security Camera System (2 Cameras, 1 Hub)" and the "SafePad Outdoor Power Extension Cable" in a single order. The extension cable was delivered one week later than the cameras due to a carrier delay. Upon setup, the customer realized the cameras do not support the local Wi-Fi frequency—confirmed after opening, installing, then repacking one camera (removed cable tie; minor cable scuff). The second camera and hub remain sealed. The extension cable box is unopened. The customer requests a return, but is unsure if the return window for the extension cord counts from the first delivery or from its own delivery date. They mention a bundled $20 promotional rebate, questioned whether a partial return is possible and how it affects the refund or rebate. They also ask whether opened/used and sealed cameras can be returned together and how defects arising from setup attempts are assessed for eligibility or fees. The customer requires a swift resolution due to scheduled travel in three days, and is conflicted whether to seek a replacement (if eligible) for only the malfunctioning camera or an exchange for a different model.
task.reason: Customer needs clarity on return window for delayed partial shipment, eligibility and degree of refund for opened/used and sealed items, reconciliation of used item condition, and bundle rebate calculation—plus replacement versus exchange options.
task.task: Order with mixed delivery dates and item conditions (one camera used/opened, others sealed, extension cable unopened) is subject to return request involving timing, condition, refund calculation, and product swap ambiguities.
task.related_policy_issues: ["No specifics on what constitutes 'certain circumstances' warranting a longer refund timeframe.", "Borderline scenarios (such as limited item use, light wear, or opened packaging) are not addressed, resulting in workflow friction for return eligibility determination.", "Uncertainty about who is responsible for communicating or justifying the reduced refund.", "The computation for how refunds are adjusted when part of a bundle or discount is returned is not explained.", "Ambiguity regarding which sub-items (tags, components, hygiene seals, etc.) are required for which product categories."]

first_customer_message: Hello, this is Alastair MacGregor. I need to return a couple of items from my recent order. I opened one camera from the "OmniPro Wireless Security Camera System", but it doesn’t work with my Wi-Fi, and the other camera plus the extension cable are still sealed. I’m a bit confused about the return window for the extension cable since it arrived late. Can you help?
detail_agent: Customer wants to return the "OmniPro Wireless Security Camera System" and is asking about the return timeline for the extension cable.

customer_task_detail.basic_info: Customer ordered the "OmniPro Wireless Security Camera System (2 Cameras, 1 Hub)" and the "SafePad Outdoor Power Extension Cable". The cameras were delivered on time, but the extension cable was delayed by a week. The order ID is not mentioned.
customer_task_detail.private_info: The customer opened one camera for setup, which does not support the local Wi-Fi frequency. The second camera and the hub are unopened, and the extension cable was delivered unopened.
customer_task_detail.behavior: The customer initially withholds the exact issues related to the first camera's condition and its impact on the return eligibility, not disclosing whether the opened camera has any visible damage, which may affect the eligibility. Follow-up questions regarding the opened camera's functionality will trigger disclosure of its condition.

persona.Name: Isabella Gómez
persona.Person description: Isabella is a historian based in Málaga with a deep fascination for European cemeteries and their cultural context. She spends her weekends exploring historical sites and archives, often volunteering to lead walking tours at the English Cemetery. Isabella is passionate about sharing lesser-known stories, like those of William Mark and other historical figures who shaped Málaga’s heritage. She enjoys reading, networking with other researchers, and occasionally contributes to local history publications.

first_customer_message: Hi, I’m Isabella. I have a bit of a problem with my order. I got the OmniPro cameras and SafePad cable, but the cameras don’t work with my Wi-Fi, and I opened one to check. I think I need to return them, but I'm kinda confused about the return timing since the cable came late, and I’m not sure how that affects things like the rebate. Can you help me figure this out?
detail_agent: Customer wants to return the OmniPro Wireless Security Camera System and needs clarity on the return timing and rebate impact due to a late delivery.

customer_task_detail.basic_info: Isabella purchased the OmniPro Wireless Security Camera System and the SafePad Outdoor Power Extension Cable in a single order. The extension cable was delivered one week later than the cameras. The order was placed recently.
customer_task_detail.private_info: The first camera was opened and has minor cable scuff marks, while the second camera and hub remain sealed, and the extension cable box is unopened.
customer_task_detail.behavior: Isabella is withholding specific details about the condition of the opened camera and the timing of the return window. She may disclose these details after being asked specifically about the opened camera and the implications on the return process.

Primary Policy.text:
Amazon Return Policy
Easy shopping, simple returns - that's our promise. At Amazon, we're committed to making your shopping experience as seamless and worry-free as possible. We understand that there may be times when a purchase may not meet your expectations or your needs might change. When that happens, we make completing a return simple and convenient.
Most items can be returned for a refund or replacement/exchange within 30 days of delivery as long as they are in original or unused condition. For eligible items, you can enjoy free returns at many locations near you. For information on an item's return eligibility, please check the product detail page before placing your order. After placing an order, you can find relevant information on an item's return eligibility in your Order History.
A refund will be provided if Amazon (or the third-party seller) has received the item, and determined that you are eligible for a refund. It can take up to 30 days for us to receive and process your return. In certain circumstances refund timeframes may be longer. If we need additional information about your return, we will notify you with instructions to contact Customer Service. For more information, please see our Refunds page.
2025 Holiday Season Extended Return Window
For the 2025 holiday season, most items purchased between November 1 and December 31, 2025 can be returned through January 31, 2026. Apple-branded products purchased between November 1 and December 31, 2025 can be returned through January 15, 2026.
Refund Timelines
Once we issue your refund, it may take additional time for your financial institution to make funds available in your account.
| Refund Timeline | Refund Method |
|---|---|
| 2-3 hours | Amazon.com Gift Card or Gift Card balance |
| 3-5 business days | Credit Card |
| Up to 5 business days | Shop with Reward Points |
| Up to 10 business days | Debit card |
| Checking account | |
| EBT Card | |
| Cash (at participating locations) | |
| Up to 30 days | Prepaid credit card (depending on the issuer of the card) |
| No refund issued | Promotional certificate |
Return Window
Most items sold on Amazon.com can be returned within 30 days of delivery - some exceptions include:
| 7 days |
|
| 15 days |
|
| 90 days |
|
| 180 days |
|
| 365 days |
|
Items That You Can't Return
Some products are non-returnable, such as the following:
- Perishables
- Products that may pose potential health and safety risks if returned
- Products with shipping restrictions
- Customized products made specifically for you
- Redeemable products
- Amazon Pharmacy products
- Pet medication products
- Certain digital products
- Automobiles
Additionally, products listed as "Final Sale" are non-returnable and non-refundable, including trading card games, specific discounted items, and items sold in the Amazon Haul store that are $3 and less.
In the unlikely event that a non-returnable/Final Sale item arrives damaged, defective, or materially different from what was ordered, please contact Customer Service.
Initiating a Return
To initiate a return on an item that's eligible for return, simply go to Your Orders and click on "Return Items" button next to the item. Detail instructions can be found in this video.
Third-Party Seller Returns
When you order from a third-party seller that fulfills and ships their own inventory, your return is sent back to the seller instead of Amazon. Sellers must offer one of the following:
- A return address within the United States where you can ship the item
- A prepaid return label; or
- A full refund without requesting the item be returned
For more information about returns to sellers, please refer to Returns to Third-Party Sellers.
Sending Us Your Return
You can return most items for free at over 8,000 convenient locations, typically within a 5-mile radius of your address. Additionally, most returns do not need to be boxed or labeled. Please ensure that your item is returned in original or unused condition with tags attached and hygiene seals and liners intact, and in the original manufacturer's packaging including tags, components, accessories, manuals, certificates of authenticity, and other inserts. Please return your item before the "return by date" shown in your return request confirmation email or in the "Return Request" tab in your Order History.
Please follow the return instructions for each item to receive a refund. Do not include items from separate orders in the same return.
If you have bought an item (for example, computers, electronics) on which you've saved personal information, please erase this information completely by following manufacturer instructions.
Amazon Pharmacy
Items purchased from Amazon Pharmacy are not returnable or refundable. For more details or further assistance with an Amazon Pharmacy item, please see the Amazon Pharmacy Help Page.
Amazon Business
This return policy also applies to purchases made through your Amazon Business account. For the return policies on special Amazon Business programs such as Spot Buys made through the Custom Quote feature, please consult the Amazon Business Accounts Terms and Conditions and Feature Terms and Conditions. Contact Amazon Business for more help.
Amazon Luxury Stores
For more information on Luxury Stores items, or if there are any issues with your Luxury Stores purchase, please visit our Luxury Stores Help Page.
Return Fees
While returns are generally free, certain situations or item conditions may incur fees. Note that an item cannot be sent back to you after it has been returned (except certain Luxury Stores items that incur 100% damage fees).
| Fee | Description | Amount |
|---|---|---|
| Return Shipping Fee | Most items include at least one free return shipping option. However, you may be
charged if:
|
Varies by item and/or the shipping method selected. |
| Late fee | You may be charged a fee when you do not drop off or complete a carrier pickup on or before the "return by date". | 20% of the item price for the first 30 days after the "return by date"; 100% of the item price afterwards. |
| Damage fee | You may be charged a fee when you return an item that is damaged, missing parts, not in original condition, has tags removed or have obvious signs of use for reasons not due to an Amazon.com or seller error. | Up to 50% of the item price, except for Luxury Stores items, which will be charged 100% of the item price. |
| Restocking Fee | You may be charged a fee when you return an item from any of the following product
types:
|
100% of the item price |
Heavy and/or Bulky Items
Items that are considered heavy and/or bulky:
- Weigh 50 lbs or more.
- The longest side (when packed) exceeds 59 inches.
- The item’s girth exceeds 130 inches (girth = length + 2 * (width + height)).
These returns may incur a return shipping fee that is variable based on the item’s weight, dimensions, and handling requirements. Some returns may require an appointment for a home collection by a specialty carrier team. Additional fees may apply for returns to third-party sellers. For more information about returns to sellers, please refer to Returns to Third-Party Sellers.
Discounted Purchases
If you return an item that was part of a discount qualification, we will reduce your refund to account for the return.
Returning a Gift
Go to the Returns page. Use the 17-digit order number, for example 123-1234567-1234567 (add: "how do I find this?" hover-over link) on your packing slip that came with your item or on the digital gift receipt, to initiate a return. If you can't locate the order number, ask the gift giver. If you need an exchange or replacement, you'll need to return the gift and place a new order.
- Kindle books you receive as a gift are eligible for exchange for an Amazon.com Gift Card before acceptance.
Global Store Returns
Items shipped from Amazon.com, including Amazon Resale, can be returned within 30 days of delivery, with some exceptions:
- For most Amazon Global Store returns, you will be provided with a pre-paid UPS return label which allows you to return the item(s) to any UPS drop-off point located across the US. You can find your most convenient UPS location using the following link: https://www.ups.com/dropoff/?loc=en_US
- Not all Global Store products are eligible for a prepaid return. In this case, you will need to return the item at your own expense. We recommend you return the item(s) using a trackable method at the carrier of your choice.
- It can take up to 25 days for an item to reach us once you return it. Once the item is received and processed at our fulfillment center, it takes two business days for the refund to be processed and 3-5 business days for the refund amount to show up in your account.
- Amazon will automatically refund up to $20 for return postage costs on receipt of the item. If your return postage costs exceed $20, you may contact Customer Service to request a refund of the remaining postage cost. If you return a defective, damaged or incorrect item, you'll be refunded the full postage cost, as well as your Import Fees Deposit, once your return is processed.
Special Delivery Service Returns
Items delivered with "Deluxe Delivery & Unpack" and "Deluxe Delivery & Assembly" services qualify for an Instant Return at the point of delivery. Please visit our Special Delivery Options page for more details.
Product Warranties
Please contact the manufacturer directly for product registration and warranty-related information. A manufacturer warranty may not cover used products offered on Amazon.com. Review the manufacturer warranty details on the product detail page for coverage or contact the manufacturer directly.
Unintended Item(s) in My Return
If you accidentally sent the wrong item to Amazon, please contact Customer Service as soon as possible. Note that we may not be able to locate mistakenly sent items and are unable to provide compensation in these cases. Amazon does not store items sent in error and will handle (and/or dispose) such items at our discretion.
Returning Items Purchased in a Bundle
You must return all items purchased in a Bundle with Savings to receive a refund. Partial refunds are not available.
Note:
Amazon offers a convenient return service for reasonable use by our customers. Should customers abuse this service, we may adjust its availability.
For any return, Amazon may require additional information and documentation (such as a government-issued photo identification) during the processing of a return to help determine whether to provide a refund/replacement. Amazon reserves the right to take additional actions to prevent fraud or abuse (including denial of returns, refunds or exchanges, or imposing return fees). Amazon may modify this policy at any time.

Related policies.text:
Returns to Third-Party Sellers
When you order from a third-party seller that fulfills and ships its own inventory, your return is sent back to the seller instead of Amazon.
Content
Request a return
Go to the Amazon Online Returns Center to start your return request for third-party seller items.
Get return instructions
The seller will provide one of these return methods:
- A return address in the United States
- A prepaid return label
- A full refund without returning the item
Package your return
To pack your item for safe return to the seller:
- Use the original packaging or a similar-sized box
- Disassemble items that required assembly
- Remove all personal information, passwords, and passcodes from electronic devices. For instructions on how to do this, check the manufacturer’s website or contact the manufacturer for support.
Ship your return
To return your item to the seller:
- Use the shipping label provided by the seller
- Items valued at $100 or more: Insure the shipment and use a signature service
- Items valued over $35: Use a trackable shipping service
- Items below $35: We suggest using the USPS delivery confirmation service
We may not be able to cover you under the A-to-z Guarantee if:
- The package doesn't arrive with the seller and you didn't use a trackable method to return it, or
- You refuse delivery of the shipment, to return it to the sender.
Track your refund
The seller will process your refund after receiving the return, usually within two business days. You'll receive a notification of your return and refund details. Outbound shipping charges aren't always refunded upon return.
Understanding refund delays
Refunds can be delayed if:
- Your return is in transit longer than expected.
- You use an untrackable shipping method.
- The seller receives a different item than ordered.
- An item that was sold as new, is returned with signs of use or damage.
Extra-large or heavy items
A package is defined as extra large or heavy if it:
- weights more than 150 pounds
- is over 108 inches long
- exceeds a total of 165 inches in length and girth [(2 x width) + (2 x height)].
For extra-large items, you'll receive either:
- A postage-due label (you pay for shipping)
- A prepaid label from the seller
What to do next
If you need help after returning an item to a third-party seller:
- You can contact the seller.
- If the seller doesn't respond within 48 hours, you can request an A-to-z Guarantee refund if:
- The seller doesn't offer you an approved return method within 48 hours of asking to return a damaged, defective, or not as described item, OR
- You returned an item in line with the Amazon Return Policy, but you haven't received the expected refund. Check the Return Fees section of the Amazon Return Policy before requesting an A-to-z Guarantee refund.

persona.Name: Janet Rogers
persona.Person description: Janet is the nutrition director for a mid-sized county school district. She is committed to providing healthy, balanced meals to students and is an expert in school nutrition policy, compliance, and federal regulations. Janet regularly attends conferences to keep up with new best practices and regulations, and she leads professional development workshops for her team. Outside work, she enjoys gardening and local community events.

task.detail: Customer purchased the "OmniPro Wireless Security Camera System (2 Cameras, 1 Hub)" and the "SafePad Outdoor Power Extension Cable" in a single order. The extension cable was delivered one week later than the cameras due to a carrier delay. Upon setup, the customer realized the cameras do not support the local Wi-Fi frequency—confirmed after opening, installing, then repacking one camera (removed cable tie; minor cable scuff). The second camera and hub remain sealed. The extension cable box is unopened. The customer requests a return, but is unsure if the return window for the extension cord counts from the first delivery or from its own delivery date. They mention a bundled $20 promotional rebate, questioned whether a partial return is possible and how it affects the refund or rebate. They also ask whether opened/used and sealed cameras can be returned together and how defects arising from setup attempts are assessed for eligibility or fees. The customer requires a swift resolution due to scheduled travel in three days, and is conflicted whether to seek a replacement (if eligible) for only the malfunctioning camera or an exchange for a different model.
task.reason: Customer needs clarity on return window for delayed partial shipment, eligibility and degree of refund for opened/used and sealed items, reconciliation of used item condition, and bundle rebate calculation—plus replacement versus exchange options.
task.task: Order with mixed delivery dates and item conditions (one camera used/opened, others sealed, extension cable unopened) is subject to return request involving timing, condition, refund calculation, and product swap ambiguities.
task.related_policy_issues: ["No specifics on what constitutes 'certain circumstances' warranting a longer refund timeframe.", "Borderline scenarios (such as limited item use, light wear, or opened packaging) are not addressed, resulting in workflow friction for return eligibility determination.", "Uncertainty about who is responsible for communicating or justifying the reduced refund.", "The computation for how refunds are adjusted when part of a bundle or discount is returned is not explained.", "Ambiguity regarding which sub-items (tags, components, hygiene seals, etc.) are required for which product categories."]

first_customer_message: Hi, I need to return the cameras from my order. One of them doesn’t work with my Wi-Fi, I think I messed up the setup a bit, but the other one and the extension cord are sealed. I'm not sure about the return timing for the extension, since it came later. Can you help with that?
detail_agent: Customer wants to return the cameras from their order and is asking about the return timing for the extension cord.

customer_task_detail.basic_info: Customer ordered the 'OmniPro Wireless Security Camera System (2 Cameras, 1 Hub)' and the 'SafePad Outdoor Power Extension Cable.' The cameras were delivered first, and the extension cable arrived a week later due to a delay.
customer_task_detail.private_info: One camera was opened and set up, revealing it doesn't support the local Wi-Fi frequency. It was then repacked with minor signs of use. The second camera and hub are unopened, while the extension cable box is also unopened.
customer_task_detail.behavior: Customer withholds details about the specific status of the used camera and their uncertainty about eligibility for returning opened items until an agent inquires about the setup process or details surrounding the condition of each item.

persona.Name: Latasha Edwards
persona.Person description: Latasha is a dedicated policy analyst focused on social justice issues—especially poverty reduction and child advocacy. She spends her days researching anti-poverty programs and analyzing data related to child poverty and systemic disparities among racial and ethnic groups. Outside of work, she enjoys attending community organizing events, reading about history and structural inequalities, and mentoring young professionals from underrepresented backgrounds. She is passionate about advocating for higher poverty thresholds and policy responses that address both immediate and generational impacts of poverty, including during times of crisis like the pandemic.

first_customer_message: Hi, this is Latasha. I need to return the wireless security cameras, but I'm not sure about the return window since one was delivered late. The other items are still sealed, and I opened one and found it doesn't work with my Wi-Fi. Can I get some help with this?
detail_agent: Customer wants to return the wireless security cameras and is asking about the return window for the delayed shipment.

customer_task_detail.basic_info: Customer purchased the "OmniPro Wireless Security Camera System (2 Cameras, 1 Hub)" and the "SafePad Outdoor Power Extension Cable" in a single order. The cameras and extension cable had mixed delivery dates.
customer_task_detail.private_info: The customer opened one of the cameras and found it incompatible with her local Wi-Fi, although the other camera and hub remain unopened. The extension cable is also unopened.
customer_task_detail.behavior: Customer is withholding the specifics about the minor scuff on the opened camera and details about the promotional rebate. This information may be revealed when the agent asks about the condition of the opened item or the rebate impact on the return.

Primary Policy.text:
Amazon Return Policy
Easy shopping, simple returns - that's our promise. At Amazon, we're committed to making your shopping experience as seamless and worry-free as possible. We understand that there may be times when a purchase may not meet your expectations or your needs might change. When that happens, we make completing a return simple and convenient.
Most items can be returned for a refund or replacement/exchange within 30 days of delivery as long as they are in original or unused condition. For eligible items, you can enjoy free returns at many locations near you. For information on an item's return eligibility, please check the product detail page before placing your order. After placing an order, you can find relevant information on an item's return eligibility in your Order History.
A refund will be provided if Amazon (or the third-party seller) has received the item, and determined that you are eligible for a refund. It can take up to 30 days for us to receive and process your return. In certain circumstances refund timeframes may be longer. If we need additional information about your return, we will notify you with instructions to contact Customer Service. For more information, please see our Refunds page.
2025 Holiday Season Extended Return Window
For the 2025 holiday season, most items purchased between November 1 and December 31, 2025 can be returned through January 31, 2026. Apple-branded products purchased between November 1 and December 31, 2025 can be returned through January 15, 2026.
Refund Timelines
Once we issue your refund, it may take additional time for your financial institution to make funds available in your account.
| Refund Timeline | Refund Method |
|---|---|
| 2-3 hours | Amazon.com Gift Card or Gift Card balance |
| 3-5 business days | Credit Card |
| Up to 5 business days | Shop with Reward Points |
| Up to 10 business days | Debit card |
| Checking account | |
| EBT Card | |
| Cash (at participating locations) | |
| Up to 30 days | Prepaid credit card (depending on the issuer of the card) |
| No refund issued | Promotional certificate |
Return Window
Most items sold on Amazon.com can be returned within 30 days of delivery - some exceptions include:
| 7 days |
|
| 15 days |
|
| 90 days |
|
| 180 days |
|
| 365 days |
|
Items That You Can't Return
Some products are non-returnable, such as the following:
- Perishables
- Products that may pose potential health and safety risks if returned
- Products with shipping restrictions
- Customized products made specifically for you
- Redeemable products
- Amazon Pharmacy products
- Pet medication products
- Certain digital products
- Automobiles
Additionally, products listed as "Final Sale" are non-returnable and non-refundable, including trading card games, specific discounted items, and items sold in the Amazon Haul store that are $3 and less.
In the unlikely event that a non-returnable/Final Sale item arrives damaged, defective, or materially different from what was ordered, please contact Customer Service.
Initiating a Return
To initiate a return on an item that's eligible for return, simply go to Your Orders and click on "Return Items" button next to the item. Detail instructions can be found in this video.
Third-Party Seller Returns
When you order from a third-party seller that fulfills and ships their own inventory, your return is sent back to the seller instead of Amazon. Sellers must offer one of the following:
- A return address within the United States where you can ship the item
- A prepaid return label; or
- A full refund without requesting the item be returned
For more information about returns to sellers, please refer to Returns to Third-Party Sellers.
Sending Us Your Return
You can return most items for free at over 8,000 convenient locations, typically within a 5-mile radius of your address. Additionally, most returns do not need to be boxed or labeled. Please ensure that your item is returned in original or unused condition with tags attached and hygiene seals and liners intact, and in the original manufacturer's packaging including tags, components, accessories, manuals, certificates of authenticity, and other inserts. Please return your item before the "return by date" shown in your return request confirmation email or in the "Return Request" tab in your Order History.
Please follow the return instructions for each item to receive a refund. Do not include items from separate orders in the same return.
If you have bought an item (for example, computers, electronics) on which you've saved personal information, please erase this information completely by following manufacturer instructions.
Amazon Pharmacy
Items purchased from Amazon Pharmacy are not returnable or refundable. For more details or further assistance with an Amazon Pharmacy item, please see the Amazon Pharmacy Help Page.
Amazon Business
This return policy also applies to purchases made through your Amazon Business account. For the return policies on special Amazon Business programs such as Spot Buys made through the Custom Quote feature, please consult the Amazon Business Accounts Terms and Conditions and Feature Terms and Conditions. Contact Amazon Business for more help.
Amazon Luxury Stores
For more information on Luxury Stores items, or if there are any issues with your Luxury Stores purchase, please visit our Luxury Stores Help Page.
Return Fees
While returns are generally free, certain situations or item conditions may incur fees. Note that an item cannot be sent back to you after it has been returned (except certain Luxury Stores items that incur 100% damage fees).
| Fee | Description | Amount |
|---|---|---|
| Return Shipping Fee | Most items include at least one free return shipping option. However, you may be
charged if:
|
Varies by item and/or the shipping method selected. |
| Late fee | You may be charged a fee when you do not drop off or complete a carrier pickup on or before the "return by date". | 20% of the item price for the first 30 days after the "return by date"; 100% of the item price afterwards. |
| Damage fee | You may be charged a fee when you return an item that is damaged, missing parts, not in original condition, has tags removed or have obvious signs of use for reasons not due to an Amazon.com or seller error. | Up to 50% of the item price, except for Luxury Stores items, which will be charged 100% of the item price. |
| Restocking Fee | You may be charged a fee when you return an item from any of the following product
types:
|
100% of the item price |
Heavy and/or Bulky Items
Items that are considered heavy and/or bulky:
- Weigh 50 lbs or more.
- The longest side (when packed) exceeds 59 inches.
- The item’s girth exceeds 130 inches (girth = length + 2 * (width + height)).
These returns may incur a return shipping fee that is variable based on the item’s weight, dimensions, and handling requirements. Some returns may require an appointment for a home collection by a specialty carrier team. Additional fees may apply for returns to third-party sellers. For more information about returns to sellers, please refer to Returns to Third-Party Sellers.
Discounted Purchases
If you return an item that was part of a discount qualification, we will reduce your refund to account for the return.
Returning a Gift
Go to the Returns page. Use the 17-digit order number, for example 123-1234567-1234567 (add: "how do I find this?" hover-over link) on your packing slip that came with your item or on the digital gift receipt, to initiate a return. If you can't locate the order number, ask the gift giver. If you need an exchange or replacement, you'll need to return the gift and place a new order.
- Kindle books you receive as a gift are eligible for exchange for an Amazon.com Gift Card before acceptance.
Global Store Returns
Items shipped from Amazon.com, including Amazon Resale, can be returned within 30 days of delivery, with some exceptions:
- For most Amazon Global Store returns, you will be provided with a pre-paid UPS return label which allows you to return the item(s) to any UPS drop-off point located across the US. You can find your most convenient UPS location using the following link: https://www.ups.com/dropoff/?loc=en_US
- Not all Global Store products are eligible for a prepaid return. In this case, you will need to return the item at your own expense. We recommend you return the item(s) using a trackable method at the carrier of your choice.
- It can take up to 25 days for an item to reach us once you return it. Once the item is received and processed at our fulfillment center, it takes two business days for the refund to be processed and 3-5 business days for the refund amount to show up in your account.
- Amazon will automatically refund up to $20 for return postage costs on receipt of the item. If your return postage costs exceed $20, you may contact Customer Service to request a refund of the remaining postage cost. If you return a defective, damaged or incorrect item, you'll be refunded the full postage cost, as well as your Import Fees Deposit, once your return is processed.
Special Delivery Service Returns
Items delivered with "Deluxe Delivery & Unpack" and "Deluxe Delivery & Assembly" services qualify for an Instant Return at the point of delivery. Please visit our Special Delivery Options page for more details.
Product Warranties
Please contact the manufacturer directly for product registration and warranty-related information. A manufacturer warranty may not cover used products offered on Amazon.com. Review the manufacturer warranty details on the product detail page for coverage or contact the manufacturer directly.
Unintended Item(s) in My Return
If you accidentally sent the wrong item to Amazon, please contact Customer Service as soon as possible. Note that we may not be able to locate mistakenly sent items and are unable to provide compensation in these cases. Amazon does not store items sent in error and will handle (and/or dispose) such items at our discretion.
Returning Items Purchased in a Bundle
You must return all items purchased in a Bundle with Savings to receive a refund. Partial refunds are not available.
Note:
Amazon offers a convenient return service for reasonable use by our customers. Should customers abuse this service, we may adjust its availability.
For any return, Amazon may require additional information and documentation (such as a government-issued photo identification) during the processing of a return to help determine whether to provide a refund/replacement. Amazon reserves the right to take additional actions to prevent fraud or abuse (including denial of returns, refunds or exchanges, or imposing return fees). Amazon may modify this policy at any time.

Related policies.text:
Returns to Third-Party Sellers
When you order from a third-party seller that fulfills and ships its own inventory, your return is sent back to the seller instead of Amazon.
Content
Request a return
Go to the Amazon Online Returns Center to start your return request for third-party seller items.
Get return instructions
The seller will provide one of these return methods:
- A return address in the United States
- A prepaid return label
- A full refund without returning the item
Package your return
To pack your item for safe return to the seller:
- Use the original packaging or a similar-sized box
- Disassemble items that required assembly
- Remove all personal information, passwords, and passcodes from electronic devices. For instructions on how to do this, check the manufacturer’s website or contact the manufacturer for support.
Ship your return
To return your item to the seller:
- Use the shipping label provided by the seller
- Items valued at $100 or more: Insure the shipment and use a signature service
- Items valued over $35: Use a trackable shipping service
- Items below $35: We suggest using the USPS delivery confirmation service
We may not be able to cover you under the A-to-z Guarantee if:
- The package doesn't arrive with the seller and you didn't use a trackable method to return it, or
- You refuse delivery of the shipment, to return it to the sender.
Track your refund
The seller will process your refund after receiving the return, usually within two business days. You'll receive a notification of your return and refund details. Outbound shipping charges aren't always refunded upon return.
Understanding refund delays
Refunds can be delayed if:
- Your return is in transit longer than expected.
- You use an untrackable shipping method.
- The seller receives a different item than ordered.
- An item that was sold as new, is returned with signs of use or damage.
Extra-large or heavy items
A package is defined as extra large or heavy if it:
- weights more than 150 pounds
- is over 108 inches long
- exceeds a total of 165 inches in length and girth [(2 x width) + (2 x height)].
For extra-large items, you'll receive either:
- A postage-due label (you pay for shipping)
- A prepaid label from the seller
What to do next
If you need help after returning an item to a third-party seller:
- You can contact the seller.
- If the seller doesn't respond within 48 hours, you can request an A-to-z Guarantee refund if:
- The seller doesn't offer you an approved return method within 48 hours of asking to return a damaged, defective, or not as described item, OR
- You returned an item in line with the Amazon Return Policy, but you haven't received the expected refund. Check the Return Fees section of the Amazon Return Policy before requesting an A-to-z Guarantee refund.

persona.Name: Dr. Marianne Vogel
persona.Person description: Dr. Marianne Vogel is an experienced obstetrician-gynecologist working in a major urban hospital. She is dedicated to the safety and well-being of her patients. Marianne has witnessed several situations where doulas have challenged or contradicted medical advice, leading to tension among staff and, on occasion, compromised patient care. She values teamwork and respectful collaboration but is vigilant about boundary issues that might put patients at risk.

task.detail: Customer purchased the "OmniPro Wireless Security Camera System (2 Cameras, 1 Hub)" and the "SafePad Outdoor Power Extension Cable" in a single order. The extension cable was delivered one week later than the cameras due to a carrier delay. Upon setup, the customer realized the cameras do not support the local Wi-Fi frequency—confirmed after opening, installing, then repacking one camera (removed cable tie; minor cable scuff). The second camera and hub remain sealed. The extension cable box is unopened. The customer requests a return, but is unsure if the return window for the extension cord counts from the first delivery or from its own delivery date. They mention a bundled $20 promotional rebate, questioned whether a partial return is possible and how it affects the refund or rebate. They also ask whether opened/used and sealed cameras can be returned together and how defects arising from setup attempts are assessed for eligibility or fees. The customer requires a swift resolution due to scheduled travel in three days, and is conflicted whether to seek a replacement (if eligible) for only the malfunctioning camera or an exchange for a different model.
task.reason: Customer needs clarity on return window for delayed partial shipment, eligibility and degree of refund for opened/used and sealed items, reconciliation of used item condition, and bundle rebate calculation—plus replacement versus exchange options.
task.task: Order with mixed delivery dates and item conditions (one camera used/opened, others sealed, extension cable unopened) is subject to return request involving timing, condition, refund calculation, and product swap ambiguities.
task.related_policy_issues: ["No specifics on what constitutes 'certain circumstances' warranting a longer refund timeframe.", "Borderline scenarios (such as limited item use, light wear, or opened packaging) are not addressed, resulting in workflow friction for return eligibility determination.", "Uncertainty about who is responsible for communicating or justifying the reduced refund.", "The computation for how refunds are adjusted when part of a bundle or discount is returned is not explained.", "Ambiguity regarding which sub-items (tags, components, hygiene seals, etc.) are required for which product categories."]

first_customer_message: Hi, I'm Dr. Marianne Vogel. I need to return the OmniPro cameras because they don't work with my Wi-Fi. The second camera and the hub are still sealed, but one camera was opened and scuffed a bit. Also, I just got the extension cable, and I have questions about the return window and the rebate. Can you help me with that?
detail_agent: Customer wants to return the OmniPro Wireless Security Camera System and is asking about the return window and rebate details.

customer_task_detail.basic_info: Dr. Marianne Vogel purchased the OmniPro Wireless Security Camera System (2 Cameras, 1 Hub) and the SafePad Outdoor Power Extension Cable in a single order. The cameras were delivered first, with the extension cable arriving later due to a carrier delay.
customer_task_detail.private_info: The first camera has been opened and has minor cosmetic damage (scuff) from the setup process, while the other camera and the hub remain unopened. The extension cable's box is unopened.
customer_task_detail.behavior: The customer withholds the specifics of how the camera was opened and the minor damage when initially communicating. A direct question about the camera's condition or the return eligibility could lead her to disclose details about the scuff or the setup attempts.
